narrative: US-Iran talks hit a snag as persistent geopolitical risk introduces a risk premium—USD/JPY firms to 157.07 while 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid; gold lower -0.12% near $4,725; equities +0.84%; DXY +0.01%; VIX 18.3. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence emerges as the week's G8 theme (spread 0.888%) with RBA 4.35% vs BoJ 0.75% carry favoring AUD. Watch US CPI on Wednesday for the next directional catalyst.
